# bentolab

> 

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/README.md)
- [BLE GATT Profile](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/docs/ble-gatt-profile.md)
- [Protocol Commands](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/docs/protocol-commands.md)
- [Firmware Analysis](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/docs/firmware-analysis.md)
- [Wi-Fi Protocol](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/docs/wifi-protocol.md)

## Source

- [ble_client.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/bentolab/ble_client.py): Async BLE connectivity & command protocol
- [models.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/bentolab/models.py): Data models (DeviceStatus, ThermalStep, PCRProfile)
- [protocol.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/bentolab/protocol.py): Low-level NUS UART encoding/decoding
- [thermocycler.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/bentolab/thermocycler.py): Unified high-level interface
- [wifi_client.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/bentolab/wifi_client.py): Wi-Fi connectivity

## Tools

- [ble_scanner.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/tools/ble_scanner.py): Device discovery & GATT enumeration
- [ble_commander.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/tools/ble_commander.py): Interactive BLE command REPL
- [session_logger.py](https://github.com/Lambda-Biolab/bentolab/blob/main/tools/session_logger.py): JSONL session recording
